```lean
theorem candidate_T1_free (Ōá : Character G) (hŌá : Ōá ‚Č† 1) :
    ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) = 0 := by
  classical
  obtain ‚ü®h, h_ne‚ü© := exists_ne_one_apply_of_ne_one (Ōá := Ōá) hŌá
  let S : ‚Ąā := ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)
  have hmul : (Ōá h : ‚Ąā) * S = S := by
    dsimp [S]
    calc
      (Ōá h : ‚Ąā) * ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)
          = ‚ąĎ g : G, ((Ōá h : ‚Ąā) * (Ōá g : ‚Ąā)) := by
              simp [Finset.mul_sum]
      _ = ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá (h * g) : ‚Ąā) := by
            refine Finset.sum_congr rfl ?_
            intro g _
            simp [map_mul]
      _ = ‚ąĎ g : G, (Ōá g : ‚Ąā) := by
            refine Finset.sum_bij (fun g _ => h * g) ?_ ?_ ?_ ?_
            ¬∑ intro g _
              simp
            ¬∑ intro g _
              simp
            ¬∑ intro g‚āĀ g‚āā _ _ hEq
              exact mul_left_cancel hEq
            ¬∑ intro g _
              refine ‚ü®h‚ĀĽ¬Ļ * g, by simp, ?_‚ü©
              simp [mul_assoc]
  have hŌáh_ne_one : (Ōá h : ‚Ąā) ‚Č† 1 := by
    intro hEq
    exact h_ne (by simpa using hEq)
  have hS : S = 0 := by
    have hfactor : ((Ōá h : ‚Ąā) - 1) * S = 0 := by
      calc
        ((Ōá h : ‚Ąā) - 1) * S = (Ōá h : ‚Ąā) * S - 1 * S := by ring
        _ = S - S := by simpa [hmul]
        _ = 0 := sub_self S
    have hfactor_ne : ((Ōá h : ‚Ąā) - 1) ‚Č† 0 := sub_ne_zero.mpr hŌáh_ne_one
    exact mul_eq_zero.mp hfactor |> Or.resolve_left hfactor_ne
  simpa [S] using hS
```
